plugin_description: Prayer times with live countdown, notifications, and azan.

city.label: City
city.description: Your city name in English (e.g. London).

country.label: Country
country.description: Country name or 2-letter code (e.g. UK, DZ, FR).

method.label: Calculation Method
method.description: Choose the calculation authority followed in your region.
method.russia: Spiritual Administration of Muslims of Russia

school.label: Asr Calculation School
school.description: Shafi/Maliki/Hanbali uses shadow factor 1. Hanafi uses factor 2, giving a later Asr.

hijri_day_offset.label: Hijri Day Adjustment
hijri_day_offset.description: Shift the displayed Hijri day if the API date doesn't match your local moon sighting.

twelve_hour_format.label: 12-Hour Format
twelve_hour_format.description: Show prayer times in 12-hour format (e.g. 5:23 AM) instead of 24-hour.

show_notifications.label: Prayer notifications
show_notifications.description: Show a system notification when each prayer time begins.

play_azan.label: Play Azan
play_azan.description: Play an azan audio file when each prayer time begins.

azan_file.label: Azan audio
azan_file.description: Which azan to play. Name your files azan1.mp3 / azan2.mp3 / azan3.mp3 and place them in the plugin's assets/ folder (see README).

tune.label: Enable per-prayer time offsets
tune.description: Apply per-prayer minute adjustments to fine-tune times.

show_countdown.label: Show countdown
show_countdown.description: Show a live countdown to the next prayer instead of the static time.

show_elapsed.label: Show elapsed time after prayer
show_elapsed.description: After a prayer begins, count up (+) for up to 1 hour.

hide_prayer_name.label: Hide prayer name in bar
hide_prayer_name.description: Show only the time or countdown without the prayer name.

dynamic_icon.label: Dynamic prayer icon
dynamic_icon.description: Show a sun/moon icon matching the current prayer instead of the fixed icon.

active_color.label: Active color
active_color.description: Color used when a prayer is happening now or in elapsed mode.
